name: Adam Hills
bio: Adam Hills is an Australian comedian and television presenter who began stand-up in 1989 and earned three consecutive Edinburgh Award nominations in the early 2000s. In Australia he hosted the music quiz Spicks and Specks and the talk show Adam Hills Tonight, and in the UK he has fronted the Channel 4 series The Last Leg since 2012. He is known for warm, improvisational crowd work and frequently references his prosthetic foot in his act.

timeline.ev: First of three consecutive Edinburgh Award nominations
Begins hosting Spicks and Specks on ABC
Launches talk show Adam Hills Tonight
Begins hosting The Last Leg on Channel 4
The Last Leg airs its 300th episode

accolades: Host of Channel 4's The Last Leg
Host of ABC's Spicks and Specks
